The '''Prm-3 pulse laser cannon''' was a [[pulse laser cannon]] built by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]], a company which normally produced personal [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons.

While designing the Prm-3, BlasTech cut corners to make it more affordable. This resulted in a substandard weapon with a limited maximum of 3.1 GP. This relatively low damage capability hindered the ships it was installed in, such as the standard model of the [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld]] [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 Seeker]].

Another disadvantage was that the Prm-3 did not have its own targeting system. It was forced to rely on whatever sensor package installed on the ship.
